tools.name: MPC-Tune
tools.subtitle: Automatic MPC Weight Tuning via Expectation Maximisation
tools.description: MPC-Tune fine-tunes the cost-function weights of a Model Predictive Controller using Expectation-Maximisation-based probabilistic policy search. A user-defined reward over the MPC trajectory guides the search: at each iteration a population of weight vectors is sampled from a Gaussian policy, the MPC is rolled out for each, and the policy is re-fit toward the best-performing samples.

benchmarks.name: CPS Verification Benchmark Suite
benchmarks.description: A curated set of hybrid system verification benchmarks spanning automotive, avionics, and medical device domains. Includes both safety and liveness properties.
